title: Intune App Supersedence
description: Intune Win32 app supersedence configuration. Located at windows/intune/supersedence.json in each title repo.

supersededAppId.description: Intune App ID (GUID) of the application being superseded. Empty string if not superseding any app.

supersedenceType.description: 'update' uninstalls the previous version before installing this one. 'replace' keeps both versions side-by-side.
